name: TextBox 23
text: Problem Statement
textPreview: Problem Statement

name: TextBox 25
text: Methodology & Tech Stack
textPreview: Methodology & Tech Stack

name: TextBox 27
text: Expected Outcomes & Impact
textPreview: Expected Outcomes & Impact

name: TextBox 32
text: Current interactive systems struggle to model physical movement reliably across heterogeneous sensors.
textPreview: Current interactive systems struggle to model physical movement reliably across heterogeneous sensors.

name: TextBox 33
text: Vision-only and isolated wearable approaches lack synchronized, standardized signals.
textPreview: Vision-only and isolated wearable approaches lack synchronized, standardized signals.

name: TextBox 34
text: This limits accurate analysis of posture, load symmetry, and physical exertion.
textPreview: This limits accurate analysis of posture, load symmetry, and physical exertion.

name: TextBox 36
text: Camera + YOLO: Body-pose estimation and object detection.
textPreview: Camera + YOLO: Body-pose estimation and object detection.

name: TextBox 37
text: ESP32 + IMU: Precise motion, orientation, and stability telemetry.
textPreview: ESP32 + IMU: Precise motion, orientation, and stability telemetry.

name: TextBox 38
text: Garmin Venu 3: Real-time heart-rate and physiological context.
textPreview: Garmin Venu 3: Real-time heart-rate and physiological context.

name: TextBox 39
text: Pipeline: Synchronizes and exports normalized JSON/JSONL features.
textPreview: Pipeline: Synchronizes and exports normalized JSON/JSONL features.

name: TextBox 41
text: Produces reusable signals for arm extension, range, symmetry, and exertion.
textPreview: Produces reusable signals for arm extension, range, symmetry, and exertion.

name: TextBox 42
text: Provides consistent, frame-level data for rigorous HCI evaluation.
textPreview: Provides consistent, frame-level data for rigorous HCI evaluation.

name: TextBox 43
text: Establishes a middleware foundation for adaptive, assistive, and rehabilitation systems.
textPreview: Establishes a middleware foundation for adaptive, assistive, and rehabilitation systems.
